name: empty-input-group
visual_summary: An empty input group is a container that wraps around an input field, often used for search or user input functionality. It typically consists of an input field, a search icon, or other relevant visual aids. A developer might use this component when creating a search bar or login form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: empty-input-group
Description: An empty input group is a container that wraps around an input field, often used for search or user input functionality. It typically consists of an input field, a search icon, or other relevant visual aids. A developer might use this component when creating a search bar or login form.
Style: e.g. modern, flat, material-ui
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, animated
Tags: input, field, search, user-input, form

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
